steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify package contents. Includes cooler base frame, tensioning straps, and mounting bolts.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify package contents. Includes cooler base frame, tensioning straps, and mounting bolts.

steps.title: Trailer Mounting
steps.content: For open trailers, drill with 27/64" bit through rail and secure base. For enclosed, secure into stud framing using self-tapping screws.

es.title: Trailer Mounting
es.content: For open trailers, drill with 27/64" bit through rail and secure base. For enclosed, secure into stud framing using self-tapping screws.

steps.title: Strap Adjustment
steps.content: Place water cooler on base plate. Press release button to thread strap, then pull loop tightly to cinch cooler securely.

es.title: Strap Adjustment
es.content: Place water cooler on base plate. Press release button to thread strap, then pull loop tightly to cinch cooler securely.
